description_long: This object consists of five reddish-brown sausage links skewered on a thin, light brown wooden stick, resembling a street food skewer. Each sausage is slightly curved and evenly spaced along the skewer, with a smooth, plump surface and rounded ends. The sausages have a uniform color and texture, with no visible grill marks, condiments, or bun. The skewer protrudes from one end, providing a handle for holding or serving. The overall appearance suggests a freshly cooked, unadorned sausage skewer, commonly found at urban food stalls or street vendors. The object is compact and lightweight, suitable for handheld consumption.
description: A skewer of five reddish-brown sausages on a thin wooden stick, with smooth, plump surfaces and no bun or condiments.
description_view_0: Five curved sausages are clearly visible, evenly spaced on a wooden skewer, viewed from above.
description_view_1: The skewer and sausages are seen from a side angle, highlighting the length and curvature of the sausages.
description_view_2: A close-up, end-on view of the sausages, showing the rounded tip and alignment along the skewer.
description_view_3: The sausages are viewed from the opposite side, displaying the back curvature and the stick extending outward.
